LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT, FINDING GOOD CAUSE, GRANTS JERROLD A. BLOCH'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFFS SINEUM BANN EYUBOGLU AND LEVENT EYUBOGLU. THE COURT RECOMMENDS THAT IF THE PLAINTIFFS APPEAR FOR TRIAL ON DECEMBER 6, 2004 WITH NEW COUNSEL, THAT TIME BE GRANTED TO NEW COUNSEL FOR TRIAL PURPOSES. ATTORNEY BLOCH WILL MAKE A TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE ON 12/06/04. ATTORNEY BLOCH SHALL PROVIDE PLAINTIFFS' CASE FILE TO PLAINTIFFS OR NEW COUNSEL AS SOON AS POSSIBLE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JAMES L. MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jerrold A. Bloch, Law offices of Jerrold A. Block (949)706-7459 moving to be relieved as counsel for Plaintiff: Sineum Banna Eyuboglu and Levent Eyuboglu
Steven D. Hillyard, Law offices of Steven D. Hillyard (415)334-6880 for defendant and opposing party: The Regents of the University of California

RULING:
In chambers conference (confidential). The Court, finding good cause, GRANTS Jerrold A. Bloch's Motion to be Relieved as Counsel of Record for Plaintiffs Sineum Bann Eyuboglu and Levent Eyuboglu. The Court recommends that if the Plaintiffs appear for trial on December 6, 2004 with new counsel, that time be granted to new counsel for trial purposes. Attorney Bloch will make a telephonic appearance on 12/06/04. Attorney Bloch shall provide Plaintiffs' case file to plaintiffs or new counsel as soon as possible. Order signed. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina T. Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
